channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Living with a partner? You may share more microbes than you think
item.description: A large study finds you may share about a quarter of your oral and gut microbes with cohabitants. Experts weigh in on whether to worry.

item.title: World Cup shows the way to a visitor's heart is through their stomach
item.description: International visitors are discovering local culinary delights, not just the action inside stadiums, during the World Cup.

item.title: 'The Lost Founder' examines a brilliant lawyer who helped shape the Constitution
item.description: Jesse Wegman's book recounts the life of James Wilson, a largely overlooked founding father who led a colorful life and died as a Supreme Court justice.

item.title: Trump further reduces Education Dept. by moving special ed and civil rights oversight
item.description: The transfers to Health and Human Services and Justice would further dismantle an agency that President Donald T.
